name: Sciter
description: Embeddable HTML/CSS/script engine for desktop UI development — alternative to Electron with tiny footprint.

seo.title: Sciter — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Sciter: Embeddable HTML/CSS/script engine for desktop UI development — alternative to Electron with tiny footprint.

when_to_use: Tiny-footprint desktop UI in HTML/CSS without bundling Chromium
Embedded UI for a C++ native desktop tool
Electron alternative with under 5MB runtime for desktop apps
HTML-based settings panel embedded in a low-resource application
Web tech UI inside a native app without Electron overhead

pros: Tiny footprint — single MB instead of hundreds
Mature — powers Norton, BitDefender desktop UIs
cons: Custom script engine, not standard JS
Licensing is source-available not fully open
Web-std compatibility is partial by design
review.verdict: The sensible Electron alternative when binary size matters, if you can accept a non-standard runtime.
review.best_for: Security and utility apps where tiny install size and low RAM are requirements
review.not_for: Teams wanting full Chromium compatibility and npm ecosystem reuse

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
